2605.03986.title: From Intent to Execution: Composing Agentic Workflows with Agent Recommendation
2605.03986.paper_summary: Multi-Agent Systems (MAS) built using AI agents fulfill a variety of user intents that may be used to design and build a family of related applications. However, the creation of such MAS currently involves manual composition of the plan, manual selection of appropriate agents, and manual creation of execution graphs. This paper introduces a framework for the automated creation of multi-agent systems which replaces multiple manual steps with an automated framework. The proposed framework consists of software modules and a workflow to orchestrate the requisite task- specific application. The modules include: an LLM-derived planner, a set of tasks described in natural language, a dynamic call graph, an orchestrator for map agents to tasks, and an agent recommender that finds the most suitable agent(s) from local and global agent registries. The agent recommender uses a two-stage information retrieval (IR) system comprising a fast retriever and an LLM-based re-ranker. We implemented a series of experiments exploring the choice of embedders, re- rankers, agent description enrichment, and supervising critique agent. We benchmarked this system end-to-end, evaluating the combination of planning, agent selection, and task completion, with our proposed approach. Our experimental results show that our approach outperforms the state-of-the- art in terms of the recall rate and is more robust and scalable compared to previous approaches. The critique agent holistically reevaluates both agent and tool recommendations against the overall plan. We show that the inclusion of the critique agent further enhances the recall score, proving that the comprehensive review and revision of task-based agent selection is an essential step in building end-to-end multi-agent systems.
2605.03986.paper_summary_zh: 多智能體系統（MAS）使用 AI 智能體來滿足各種用戶意圖，這些意圖可用於設計和構建一系列相關應用程序。 然而，目前創建這樣的 MAS 涉及手動編排計劃、手動選擇適當的智能體以及手動創建執行圖。 本文介紹了一個自動創建多智能體系統的框架，該框架用自動化框架取代了多個手動步驟。 提議的框架由軟件模塊和工作流程組成，以協調所需的任務特定應用。 模塊包括：一個基於 LLM 的規劃器、一組用自然語言描述的任務、一個動態調用圖、一個將智能體映射到任務的協調器，以及一個從本地和全球智能體註冊表中找到最合適智能體的智能體推薦系統。 智能體推薦系統使用一個由快速檢索器和基於 LLM 的重新排名器組成的兩階段信息檢索（IR）系統。 我們實施了一系列實驗，探討嵌入器、重新排名器、智能體描述增強和監督評估智能體的選擇。 我們對該系統進行了端到端的基準測試，評估了計劃、智能體選擇和任務完成的組合，並與我們提出的方法進行比較。 我們的實驗結果表明，我們的方法在召回率方面優於最先進技術，並且相比於以往的方法更具穩健性和可擴展性。 評估智能體從整體計劃的角度全面重新評估智能體和工具的推薦。 我們展示了評估智能體的納入進一步提高了召回分數，證明了基於任務的智能體選擇的全面審查和修訂是構建端到端多智能體系統的重要步驟。
2605.03986.author: Kishan Athrey et.al.
2605.03986.authors: Kishan Athrey, Ramin Pishehvar, Brian Riordan, Mahesh Viswanathan
